### Added

- Support text containing double quotes like "hello world".
- Support Windows paths like `C:\\Users\\orca\\workspace`.
- Support escaped JSON fragments like `{\"name\":\"tswagger\"}`.
- Support markdown links with query strings like [search](https://example.com/search?q="swagger"&path=C:\\temp).
- Support mixed punctuation: slash `/`, backslash `\\`, and quotes `"` in the same line.
